narrative:
Catawba Island 3 (precinct in Ottawa County) has 1,127 registered voters, with 45.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.0 percentage points.
